output.summary: Implemented 6 accessibility improvements for DynamicContentCarousel following WAI-ARIA carousel pattern

filesCreated.purpose: Pause icon for autoplay toggle button
Play icon for autoplay toggle button

filesModified.purpose: Add WAI-ARIA carousel attributes, slide roles, and autoplay toggle button
changes: Line 112: Updated controls condition to include autoplayCarousel (show controls row when autoplay enabled even if nav/pagination disabled)
Lines 114-122: Added autoplay toggle button before pagination with aria-label, data-label-pause/play attributes, and Pause.svg icon
Line 115: Added aria-hidden='true' to .swiper-pagination (progressbar is purely visual)
Lines 158-166: Added slide counter variables and slide ARIA attributes (role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', aria-label='Slide N of M') to each .swiper-slide

filesModified.purpose: Implement autoplay pause/play controls, prefers-reduced-motion check, and aria-live management
changes: Line 5: Added prefersReducedMotion check using window.matchMedia
Line 11: Added autoplayToggle and wrapper element selectors
Line 14: Respect prefers-reduced-motion by disabling autoplay if user prefers reduced motion
Lines 41-44: Added pauseOnMouseEnter:true and disableOnInteraction:false to autoplay config

Lines 48-91: Implemented autoplay toggle button logic with click handler, icon swapping (pause/play), aria-label updates, and aria-live management on .swiper-wrapper (off when playing, polite when paused)
Lines 74-87: Added focusin/focusout handlers on carousel parent to pause autoplay when any element receives focus and resume when focus leaves (only if was playing)

filesModified.purpose: Add pauseOnMouseEnter to editor Swiper config for consistency
changes: Lines 21-22: Removed unused ArrowLeft and ArrowRight SVG imports (linting error fix)
Lines 127-131: Added pauseOnMouseEnter:true and disableOnInteraction:false to autoplay config in TSX (matches JS config)

filesModified.purpose: Add prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable carousel animations
changes: Lines 159-178: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block that disables transitions/animations on .swiper-wrapper, carousel nav buttons, pagination progressbar fill, and card image hover zoom

warnings: Pre-existing webpack size warnings (not related to changes)
Pre-existing experimental API warnings in other blocks

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP changes are synced where applicable. The carousel renders via FilteredServerSideRender in the editor, so PHP changes automatically appear in editor preview.

testPage.notes: Test page already exists from initial build. Accessibility features can be tested on existing test content.

accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added aria-roledescription='carousel' to .swiper-parent div (line 111 in PHP). This identifies the widget as a carousel to assistive technologies per WAI-ARIA carousel pattern.

accessibilityFixes.requirement: Each slide must have role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', and aria-label with position info
accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', and aria-label='Slide N of M' to each .swiper-slide div (lines 158-166 in PHP). Used counter variable ($slide_index) and $query->post_count to generate position labels.

accessibilityFixes.requirement: Autoplay rotation control (pause/play button) with pause-on-hover/focus behavior
accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added pause/play toggle button as first focusable element in controls row (lines 114-122 in PHP). Button only renders when autoplayCarousel is enabled. Implemented click handler to toggle autoplay state and update aria-label between 'Stop slide rotation' and 'Start slide rotation'. Added pauseOnMouseEnter:true to Swiper config. Added focusin/focusout handlers on carousel parent to pause on focus and resume on blur (lines 74-87 in JS).

Added dynamic aria-live management on .swiper-wrapper (lines 48-76 in JS). Set to 'off' when autoplay is running (to avoid disruptive announcements), and 'polite' when paused (to announce slide changes to screen readers). Swiper's A11y module provides a secondary .swiper-notification element with aria-live='assertive' for per-slide announcements.

accessibilityFixes.requirement: Respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable autoplay and transitions
accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added prefersReducedMotion check in JS (line 5) that forces autoplay to false regardless of block attribute if user prefers reduced motion. Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) CSS block (lines 159-178 in swiper.css) that disables transitions on .swiper-wrapper, carousel nav buttons, pagination fill, and card image hover zoom. This is a theme-wide fix benefiting all carousel blocks.

accessibilityFixes.requirement: Pagination must be accessible or hidden from assistive technologies
accessibilityFixes.implementation: Added aria-hidden='true' to .swiper-pagination progress bar (line 115 in PHP). Since the progressbar is purely visual and navigation buttons provide the actual interactive controls, hiding it from screen readers avoids confusion. This is simpler than implementing a full progressbar role with dynamic aria-valuenow updates.

implementationNotes.waiAriaCompliance: All changes follow the WAI-ARIA Carousel Pattern (https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/carousel/). The pattern requires: (1) container with aria-roledescription='carousel', (2) slides with role='group' and aria-roledescription='slide', (3) rotation control as first tab-stop when autoplay is active, (4) pause-on-hover/focus behavior.
implementationNotes.autoplayTogglePlacement: Per WAI-ARIA pattern, rotation control is first focusable element in controls row, before pagination and navigation buttons. This makes it easy for keyboard users to locate and use.
implementationNotes.iconSwapping: Toggle button swaps between Pause.svg (initial, when playing) and Play.svg (when stopped). Icon swap is handled in JS by storing initial pauseIcon HTML and replacing with playIcon inline SVG when toggled.
implementationNotes.ariaLiveStrategy: Set aria-live='off' when autoplay is running to avoid disruptive announcements on every slide change. Set to 'polite' when paused so manual navigation changes are announced. Swiper's A11y module provides additional .swiper-notification element with assertive priority for per-slide notifications.
implementationNotes.prefersReducedMotionScope: CSS fix in swiper.css is theme-wide and benefits CardsCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, and DynamicContentCarousel. JS autoplay check is per-block (DynamicContentCarousel.js only) but pattern can be replicated in other carousel blocks.
implementationNotes.focusManagement: Pause-on-focus uses focusin on carousel parent to catch focus on any descendant element (slide content, navigation buttons, etc.). Resume-on-blur checks if relatedTarget (new focus target) is still within carousel to avoid resuming when tabbing between carousel controls.
implementationNotes.disableOnInteraction: Set to false so autoplay resumes after user interacts with nav buttons. Combined with pause-on-hover and pause-on-focus, this provides a balance between automation and user control.
